policy.checkpointPolicy: 每个 lane 完成一个可验证切片后提交、生成 patch 或在 Round Log 记录可复核 checkpoint。
policy.evolutionPolicy: 用户重复反馈、工作流缺口、AI 工具/验证失败和 Stop 收口缺口写入候选池；正式 skill/hook 修改必须人工可审查。

lanes.syncProtocol: Release lane owns the 0.2.3 version bump, release plan, tag push, GitHub Actions release verification, and Release publication. Stage explicit paths only; do not include runtime metrics JSONL or generated coordination status snapshots.

Completed on 2026-06-30T18:13:19+08:00 after user UI复验 closed BLK-20260630-001. TASK-001 added a pure Rust PtyOutputPump model and synthetic tests. TASK-002 wired PtyOutputPump into local TerminalManager reader/flusher without touching frontend Agent terminal UI. TASK-003 added child-exit waiter and final-tail-before-closed tests; frontend runtime was read-only verified because outputWriter.writeNow flushes pending data before closed text. TASK-004 added PtyProcessGuard/PtyMasterGuard, Windows Job Object soft-fail, ConPTY lifecycle lock, spawn failure/drop guard, detached close, and guard tests. TASK-005 added a local-only TerminalManager orphan reaper, Tauri command/API, and workspace restore-before hook; SSH/Telnet/Serial/container reconnect semantics were not touched. TASK-006 added local shell integration launch planning, cache scripts, Kerminal env names, allowlist/canonical path sanitization, disabled fallback summary, and TS summary typing; Agent terminal UI was not changed. TASK-007 added frontend ShellIntegrationState, xterm OSC 7/133 handlers, enabled-local-only trust, running/alt cwd spoof rejection, and kept remote/container collectCurrentDirOscSequences as untrusted fallback. TASK-008 made trusted local shell integration command blocks protocol-first via OSC 133 C/D/A/B while preserving non-integrated fallback and shellAssistEnabled=false Agent terminal boundaries. TASK-009 added a pure Rust TerminalAgentSignalDetector for OSC 777 Kerminal agent marker, OSC 133 C known-agent self-arm, OSC 9 attention, split/oversized OSC handling, unknown-agent ignore, and EOF exited. TASK-010 delivered typed AgentSignal events from TerminalManager into Agent Launcher status badge and MCP runtime_snapshot while keeping signals out of terminal data/history/log/snapshot; right sidebar Agent terminal remains real xterm/PTY with shellAssistEnabled=false. TASK-011 added TerminalEscapeResponder for DA1/DA2/startup CPR, filters backend-answered queries out of terminal data/log/snapshot, passes response sequences and post-visible-output CPR through, and uses a Node raw TTY hidden-renderer harness. TASK-012 measured current writeTerminal JSON payload cost with perf:terminal-input and found no evidence to add raw IPC; keep existing JSON invoke API. TASK-013 added src-tauri/tests/terminal_interaction_matrix.rs and passed cmd, PowerShell 7, Windows PowerShell, Git Bash and WSL bash with alternate screen, bracketed paste, Unicode input, resize, Ctrl+C and Ctrl+D coverage; unavailable shells would be reported as skipped, but current run skipped none. TASK-014 added src-tauri/tests/terminal_tui_program_matrix.rs and passed real WSL vim, less, top and tmux PTY smoke with ready/output/exit markers and real quit/detach sequences; unavailable tools would be reported as skipped, but current run skipped none. TASK-015 added src-tauri/tests/terminal_agent_cli_hitl_matrix.rs and .updeng/docs/verification/agent-cli-hitl-smoke.md. User UI复验 confirmed Codex uses Alt+Enter for newline and image paste works; Claude uses Ctrl+J for newline and Alt+V for image paste. These CLI shortcut differences are accepted and are not Kerminal PTY blockers.
lanes.checkpoint: Completed. TASK-001~TASK-015 本地实现、自动化矩阵、默认安全 HITL harness、fmt、聚焦 clippy 和 npm build 均已完成；用户真实 UI 复验确认 Codex Alt+Enter 换行/图片粘贴正常，Claude Ctrl+J 换行/Alt+V 图片粘贴正常，CLI 快捷键差异不作为 Kerminal PTY blocker。
